task_language: Pick the akita black bowl on the stove and place it on the plate
strategy_notes: Perception-isolated single-attempt solve. (1) Agentview SAM3 'the black bowl on the stove' (score 0.895) -> world_xyz (-0.275, -0.136, 0.962). (2) Agentview SAM3 'the white plate with red rim' (score 0.977) -> world_xyz (0.0475, 0.2031, 0.910). (3) Pre-position over bowl at (-0.275,-0.136,1.10) gripper open. (4) pi0_pick 'pick up the black bowl on the stove' max_chunks=20 -> success, gripper opening 0.0114, lift 0.05m. (5) set_gripper +1 steps=10 to firm grip. (6) Lift to z=1.20. (7) Waypoint (-0.05,0.05,1.20) then over plate (0.0475,0.248,1.10) -- traversal split since |dx|+|dy| ~0.5m exceeds OSC single-step. (8) Wrist SAM3 plate -> (0.069,0.227) (within 3cm of agentview anchor, accepted as soft refine; chose agentview as authoritative). Wrist SAM3 held bowl -> (0.075,0.188,1.089). Computed bowl-eef offset dx=+0.024, dy=-0.051 (bowl rim-grasped, hangs in -y as per memory). (9) Move eef to (0.024, 0.254, 1.10) so bowl xy lands on plate xy. (10) Descend to z=0.97; OSC stalled at z=0.982 (bowl bottom contacted plate). (11) release -> libero_terminated=true.

pick_result.prompt: pick up the black bowl on the stove
